result.stderr:
Qcg 1.0.3.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Pengbo Yang

  -p, --projectpath    Required. The c# project path.

  -m, --mode           (Default: Release) The build mode (eg. Debug,Release).

  -f, --force          (Default: false) Force to write the dockerfile, if true
                       the current dockerfile will be covered.

  -d, --debug          (Default: false) Enable debug mode.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

staticCommands.name: docker
staticCommands.description: Generate a docker file for a c# web app project.

options.description: Force to write the dockerfile, if true the current dockerfile will be covered.
